title: Zero In Clothes Moth Killer 500ml (Chemical-Free Treatment Repels Clothing Moths, Larvae and Eggs)
features: Contact killer of clothing moths: Apply spray to household surfaces such as wardrobes, cupboards and drawers, to kill clothing moths, larvae and eggs
Ready-to-use treatment: The spray is water-based, solvent-free, and odourless, ideal for use in household clothing storage areas
Up to 3 months protection per application: Provides long-lasting protection from clothes moths and larvae attacks in treated areas. Heavy infestations may require re-application
Easy-to-use spray: Requires no preparation. Sold in a ready-to-use spray bottle for easy application. Simply twist the cap and spray onto desired surfaces
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Clothes Moth Killer Total, long-lasting control of clothes moths Protect clothes in wardrobes and cupboards with Zero In Clothes Moth Killer. This solvent-free formula kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs without leaving any nasty odours behind. For treatment of wardrobes, cupboards and drawers prior to clothes storage. Not for direct application to clothing or fabrics. Contains cypermethrin. Long-lasting protection from clothes moths. For use on hard surfaces in drawers, cupboards and wardrobes. Solvent-free. Odourless treatment. Contains cypermethrin. Product Highlights Solvent-Free Control Solvent-free, water-based surface treatment does not produce any nasty vapours and does not leave any unpleasant smells behind. Lasting Control of Clothes Moths Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs for long lasting protection of stored clothing and fabrics. Protects Clothes in Storage Suitable for treating wardrobes, cupboards and drawers to protect delicate woollens and fabrics from clothes moth damage. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, diffusers, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Understanding Clothes Moths Signs of Clothes Moths Unfortunately the first sure sign of a clothes moth infestation will be damage to natural clothing and fabrics. Particularly if the items affected have been kept in storage. Look out for: Visible damage to clothing (holes) Seeing larvae and/or adult moths Webbing/cocoons in corners of wardrobes or drawers Causes of Clothes Moth Clothes moths are attracted to animal hair (wool, cashmere, fur) which provides a rich source of food for their larvae. Dirty/used clothes are usually to blame for initial infestations as moths are drawn to sweat and body oil. Be extra careful when introducing vintage clothing to wardrobes and drawers and ideally wash/dry clean before storing. Treatment & Prevention Larvae cause the damage so it's important to break the cycle. Wash clothing before storage and place Zero In moth repellent products within wardrobes and drawers. Apply Zero In solutions and sprays to the inside of wardrobes and furniture prior to storing fabrics inside and monitor for infestations with pheromone traps.
